speaker: seller

args.message: Hey there! You've got great taste — this 2017 Altima SV is one of my favorite cars on the lot right now. Just came through service, runs beautifully, and at $11,495 it's priced well below what I've been seeing these go for at auction lately. Want to take it for a spin?

text: Hey there! You've got great taste — this 2017 Altima SV is one of my favorite cars on the lot right now. Just came through service, runs beautifully, and at $11,495 it's priced well below what I've been seeing these go for at auction lately. Want to take it for a spin?

speaker: buyer

args.message: Thanks, it looks great! Has this car been in any accidents?

text: Thanks, it looks great! Has this car been in any accidents?

speaker: seller

args.message: Great question — and I'm happy to tell you this one's got a clean title, no accidents on the Carfax. That's actually one of the reasons I was excited when we got it in. You'd be surprised how hard it is to find a clean Altima at this price point with this kind of condition. The previous owner really took care of it. Want me to pop the hood so you can take a look?

text: That's good to hear. I'm very interested. How about $11,200?

speaker: seller

args.message: I appreciate the offer! You're clearly serious, and I like that. Look, I'm already priced pretty aggressively on this one — I saw a similar '17 Altima SV with MORE miles go for $12,100 at auction just last week. Tell you what, meet me at $11,350 and I'll even throw in a fresh oil change and a full tank of gas. That's a fair deal for both of us. What do you say?
